title: Thursley National Nature Reserve: change to name and site area
body: "Thursley NNR in Surrey has increased in size and in future will be known as Wealden Heaths NNR.  This reserve will continue to be managed by Natural England, the Amphibian and Reptile Conservation Trust, Forestry England, Hampton Estate, National Trust, RSPB, Surrey County Council, Surrey Wildlife Trust and Waverley Borough Council.  See the maps attached to this page for the area of land affected.  "
